template.title: Password Reset Request - [User Name]
template.description:
User is unable to access their account and requires a password reset.

**User Details:**
- Name: [Full Name]
- Username: [username]
- Email: [email@company.com]
- Department: [Department]
- Manager: [Manager Name]

**Issue Details:**
- Last successful login: [Date/Time]
- Account status: [Active/Locked/Disabled]
- MFA enrolled: [Yes/No]
- Password last changed: [Date]

**Verification Completed:**
- [ ] Verified user identity (manager confirmation)
- [ ] Checked account status in IAM system
- [ ] Confirmed MFA device availability
- [ ] Verified user has access to recovery email

**Actions Taken:**
1. Reset password in [IAM_SYSTEM]
2. Sent temporary password to verified email
3. Instructed user to change on first login
4. Confirmed MFA re-enrollment if needed

**Resolution:**
User successfully logged in with new credentials and changed temporary password.

**Time to Resolve:** [X minutes]
**Follow-up Required:** No
